# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_snap_info (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `hostname` (String) The instance name.
- `snapname` (String) Name of the snapshot that has to be listed.
- `vmid` (String) The instance ID. If not set, will be fetched from PromoxAPI based on the hostname.

### Read-Only

- `snapshot` (String) Snapshot information when snapname is provided and found.
- `snapshots` (String) List of snapshots when snapname is not provided.
